summary: PRODUCTION READINESS AUDIT — Iteration 18. End-to-end Pass/Fail matrix across all CMMS modules. Backend: 44/44 pytest passed (100%). Frontend: 8/8 critical UI flows passed (100%). All known previous-iteration bugs verified fixed (EstoqueCreate fields, InspecaoCreate fields, SpareAssetCreate fields, Notification responsavel_id=None, InspecaoTipo enum). System is PRODUCTION READY.

pass_fail_matrix.WORK ORDERS: PASS (create with disciplina+causa_falha+equipamento_parado+horas_parada, read, list with tipo+disciplina filters, kanban PATCH new_status, historico)
pass_fail_matrix.INSPECTIONS: PASS (mecanica with default checklist, lubrificacao, eletrica, list, detail)
pass_fail_matrix.CHECKLIST TEMPLATES: PASS (mecanica 10 itens, eletrica 10 itens, lubrificacao 9 itens — exact match)
pass_fail_matrix.FRONTEND_ATIVOS: PASS (Novo Ativo modal opens, Setor/Nome/Tipo fields present)
pass_fail_matrix.FRONTEND_OS: PASS (Kanban shows all 5 columns; Nova OS modal exposes Disciplina + Causa + equipamento parado)
pass_fail_matrix.FRONTEND_INSPECTIONS: PASS (Nova Inspeção modal shows 3 tabs: Mecânica, Elétrica, Lubrificação)
pass_fail_matrix.FRONTEND_ESTOQUE: PASS (Novo Item modal opens, empty submit triggers browser-native required validation, NO React crash)
pass_fail_matrix.FRONTEND_DASHBOARD: PASS (KPIs render: MTBF 576h, MTTR 2h, Disponibilidade 80%, Backlog 5, OS Abertas 4; charts MTBF/MTTR, Distribuição OS por Tipo, OS por Setor, OS por Disciplina, Ativos com Mais Falhas all render)

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on initial render — cosmetic race in ResponsiveContainer; charts ultimately render correctly. Consider adding explicit minWidth/minHeight on chart containers to silence.
Legacy seeded OS #2026-00041 'AUDIT-OS-EMERG' still shows old tipo label (cosmetic carryover from iter16/17).

critical_code_review_comments: App.js is ~4914 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting per-feature modal/form components (NovoAtivoForm, NovaOSForm, NovaInspecaoForm, NovoItemEstoqueForm) into /components/forms/ for maintainability.

ResponsiveContainer charts render with width=-1/height=-1 on first paint (recharts warning). Add explicit min height (e.g., 240px) on the parent <div> to eliminate the warning and avoid potential CLS.
EstoqueUpdate model now correctly includes estoque_maximo/posicao — earlier iter17 concern resolved.
Inspecao default checklist generation works end-to-end (mecanica returns 6+ items on POST, templates endpoint returns full 10/10/9). Good.
Frontend uses both '/setores' (UI route) and backend uses '/sectors' (API route). Naming is intentionally bilingual but document this in README to avoid future confusion.
Kanban PATCH expects body {new_status: '...'} not {status: '...'} — ensure frontend dispatch matches (verified working via UI manual flow).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (8/8 critical flows: login, dashboard, sectors, ativos form, OS kanban+form, inspections tabs, estoque no-crash, PWA assets)

test_credentials: admin@manutrix.com / admin123 (works) ; tecnico@manutrix.com / tecnico123 (works, correctly 403'd on sector POST and ativo DELETE)
seed_data_creation: Created AUDIT_/TEST_ prefixed entities (sector, ativo, estoque item, spare, OS, 3 inspections). All cleaned up in TestZCleanup. A few historical AUDIT_* items from prior iterations may still exist but do not impact tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full production readiness verified at iteration 18. Use /app/backend/tests/test_iteration18_prod_audit.py as the canonical regression suite — it covers AUTH, SECTORS, ATIVOS, ESTOQUE, SPARES, WORK ORDERS, INSPECTIONS, CHECKLISTS, DASHBOARD, USERS and PERMISSIONS in a single file. Key API conventions: sectors at /api/sectors (not /api/setores), kanban PATCH body uses {new_status: ...}, estoque enums are UPPERCASE for unidade (UN/KG/L/...) and lowercase for categoria (outro/rolamento/...). Login accepts {email, password} (not 'senha').
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. All prior fixes (iter12–17) verified intact: EstoqueCreate accepts estoque_maximo/posicao, InspecaoCreate accepts frequencia + lubrification fields, SpareAssetCreate accepts tag/numero_serie/status/custo, Notification handles responsavel_id=None, InspecaoTipo enum serializes to its string value, normalizeError() in App.js prevents React-child crashes from Pydantic 422 arrays.
